case_title: CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL MONTANO PARRISH VS. ZHAO BIN CHEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL MONTANO PARRISH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MARSHALL BAXTER (MR. BAXTER APPEARING TELEPHONICALLY VIA CONFERENCE CALL DEVICE). DEFENDANT ZHAO BIN CHEN DBA AUTO REPAIR CENTER IS PRESENT WITH ZHAO BIN CHEN PRESENT AS THE OWNER OF AUTO REPAIR CENTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARRISH, CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL MONTANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHAO BIN DBA AUTO REPAIR CENTER $179.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $179.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
